recommendations.title: Radiofreccia
recommendations.overview: April 24, 1993: it's the last broadcast of Radiofreccia, an independent radio station closing after 18 years, barely one minute before coming of age. Bruno, one of its founders, begins to tell its story, the story of a group of friends—especially tro

recommendations.title: Center Stage
recommendations.overview: A group of 12 teenagers from various backgrounds enroll at the American Ballet Academy in New York to make it as ballet dancers and each one deals with the problems and stress of training and getting ahead in the world of dance.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 2
recommendations.overview: After suffering humiliation by the crew Invincible, street dancer Ash looks to gather the best dancers from around the world for a rematch.

recommendations.title: The Company
recommendations.overview: Ensemble drama centered around a group of ballet dancers, with a focus on one young dancer who's poised to become a principal performer.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Work It
recommendations.overview: A brilliant but clumsy high school senior vows to get into her late father's alma mater by transforming herself and a misfit squad into dance champions.

recommendations.title: Lovestruck: The Musical
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Music, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Harper was one of the best dancers to hit Broadway, but an injury caused her to leave the spotlight, become a choreographer, and raise her daughter Mirabella. When Mirabella decides to quit the show to get married, her mother is determined to put a s

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.

recommendations.title: The Band Wagon
recommendations.overview: A Broadway artiste turns a faded film star's comeback vehicle into an artsy flop.

recommendations.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.
